current.title: State Capacity AI
current.blurb: AI is making decisions, and nobody has to tell you. There's no standard for disclosure, no shared language for what kind of authority a system has, and no easy way to contest a decision made by software.

current.title: Occupant — AI Compute Benchmarks
current.blurb: Public data infrastructure for AI model pricing, compute deflation tracking, and market intelligence.

current.title: HeyPBJ — Structured Matching Platform
current.blurb: Dating and social discovery as a routing problem—using cohorts, compatibility metrics, and guided prompts instead of endless feeds.

current.title: Glowrm — Trust & Relationship Layer
current.blurb: Portable trust primitives for decentralized social environments—how identity, reputation, and consent travel across networks.

current.title: Leafroll — Professional Identity Layer
current.blurb: Dynamic, modular professional profiles that travel across networks—rethinking how people present work, skills, and trajectory.

current.title: Portland Digital Corps
current.blurb: 18F closed and I needed to know: does community-driven service delivery actually work when you strip away the federal badge?

current.title: Design For The Public 24
current.blurb: Two-day unconference bringing together 80+ civic technologists and designers.

current.title: Revamping Oregon High School Tennis Tournament Format
current.blurb: Five years of systems thinking, stakeholder coordination, and institutional change—moving Oregon high school tennis from a fragmented individual championship to a unified team dual-match format.

current.title: Parachute Commons License — Open Licensing That Shows Its Work
current.blurb: A modular license framework that makes sustainability tradeoffs explicit—designed to be read, forked, and adapted.

current.title: Oregon High School Tennis Rankings System
current.blurb: A data-driven ranking and playoff simulation system for Oregon high school tennis, designed to solve real problems in how teams are evaluated and seeded for state competition.

current.title: AI Economic Activity Index
current.blurb: A global index tracking AI compute activity in real-time, measuring token volumes, spend, and energy consumption across major providers—modeled on how the IMF tracks currency reserves.

current.title: Teaching Public Mechanics — University of Michigan
current.blurb: Design education shouldn't train people to build more apps. It should teach them to understand infrastructure, repair what's broken, and build systems that serve the public. That's what I'm doing at Michigan.

current.title: AT Protocol Projects
current.blurb: Interconnected suite of decentralized data infrastructure and public goods experiments.

current.title: Consequence Design
current.blurb: Framework for understanding downstream effects of design decisions. Helping teams identify harm at scale, over time, and in edge cases before they ship.

past.title: 18F — Eight Years Inside the Machine
past.blurb: Millions serves, Billions Saved. How Design Impact Can Scale Beyond The Tech

past.title: Service Delivery at Scale
past.blurb: Design leadership across federal programs serving millions. Working at the intersection of policy intent and delivery reality to improve how eligibility systems, intake processes, and service recovery work in practice.

past.title: 18F Website Redesign
past.blurb: Content-first website refresh clarifying 18F's capacity-building role.

past.title: eAPD (Electronic Advanced Planning Document)
past.blurb: Federal web application modernizing Medicaid funding requests for states.

past.title: Benefits Determination & Appeals System
past.blurb: Full-stack prototype modeling government benefits review and appeals processes.

past.title: AI Decision Transparency Dashboard
past.blurb: Frontend prototype exploring how automated benefits decisions can be reviewed and challenged.

past.title: TACLOG - Field Delivery Supply App
past.blurb: Mobile-first supply requisition prototype for offline field logistics operations.

past.title: Nautilus Staffing Prototype
past.blurb: Staffing decision tool consolidating crew management and role requirements.

past.title: City of Bloomington Website Redesign
past.blurb: Full-site redesign reorganizing municipal content around resident tasks, not departmental ownership.

past.title: Beyond Civic Tech: Public Mechanics Starts at Home
past.blurb: Conference talk about the systems that keep public services running after launch day—the invisible maintenance work, workarounds, and repair practices that hold services together.
